Simple Process

How It Works

From application to funded — faster than you'd expect.

01

Tell us about yourself

Fill out a simple 3-minute form. Checking your rate uses a soft pull — it will never affect your credit score.

02

Compare your offers

Receive personalized rate options in seconds. Pick the loan amount and term that fits your budget perfectly.

03

Sign securely online

Review every detail before you sign. Our documents are crystal-clear — no jargon, no hidden clauses.

04

Funds in 24 hours

Money lands directly in your bank account — often the same business day. Start using it right away.

Ready to get started?

Checking your rate takes 3 minutes and won't affect your credit.

Check My Rate — It's Free

Transparent Pricing

Representative APR
Comparison Table

Our rates are determined by your credit profile and loan details. The table shows representative rates across all credit tiers — no hidden costs, ever.

Fixed rate for the entire loan duration
No prepayment penalties — pay off early for free
No origination fee on qualifying loans
Rate lock from application to funding

Representative APR ${aprMin}%–${aprMax}%. The Representative APR is based on a loan of $10,000 over 60 months. Not all applicants will receive the representative rate; your actual rate depends on individual circumstances.

Credit Score APR Range Total Cost
Excellent
750+ 5.99–9.99% $11,283
Good
700–749 10.99–14.99% $13,028
Fair
660–699 15.99–19.99% $14,580
Average
620–659 20.99–24.99% $16,132
Poor
560–619 25.99–34.99% $18,247

Example based on $10,000 loan over 60 months. Representative APR ${aprMin}%. Total amount repayable varies by rate.

Why Borrowers Trust Us

Built on Compliance. Backed by Security.

Every loan on our platform meets strict federal and state standards — so you can apply with confidence.

BBB Accredited
A+ Rating
256-bit SSL
Bank-level encryption
GLBA Compliant
Your data is protected
NMLS Licensed
Registered #123456
TILA Disclosure
Full cost transparency
No Hard Pull
Rate check is soft inquiry

Your Data Is Never Sold

We collect only what is required to process your application. Your information is encrypted at rest and in transit, and is never shared with unauthorized third parties. You can request deletion of your data at any time.

Apply Securely

Real People. Real Results.

Over 50,000 borrowers have trusted us with their financial goals.

12,400+ reviews

Who Qualifies

Eligibility Requirements

Our criteria are designed to be inclusive. If you have a stable income and a bank account, you likely qualify.

Quick Self-Check

Age 18+
U.S. resident or citizen
Regular, verifiable income
Active bank account

If you checked all four, you're likely eligible. Your exact rate depends on credit profile and income.

Check My Eligibility — Free
01

Age 18 or older

Must be a legal adult to enter a loan agreement.

02

U.S. Residency

U.S. citizen or permanent resident with a valid SSN.

03

Verifiable Income

Employment, self-employment, pension, or other regular income.

04

Active Bank Account

Checking or savings account for direct deposit.

05

Credit Score 560+

We work with a range of credit histories.

06

Valid Contact Info

Working email and phone number for verification.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before you apply. Still have questions? Our team is here to help.

Still have questions?

${phone} · Mon–Fri 8am–8pm EST

No. When you check your rate, we perform a soft credit inquiry that has zero impact on your credit score. Only when you accept a loan offer and proceed to final approval do we conduct a hard inquiry, which may temporarily affect your score by a few points.
Most borrowers receive their funds within 1 business day of signing their loan agreement. Some lenders in our network offer same-day funding depending on your bank's processing times. Applications submitted and approved before 2pm EST are typically funded the next business morning.
Our installment loans can be used for virtually any legitimate purpose: debt consolidation, medical expenses, home improvement, car repairs, weddings, vacations, education expenses, or any personal financial need. Funds cannot be used for illegal activities or business start-up costs on certain products.
No. You can pay off your loan early at any time without penalty. Early payoff reduces the total interest you pay since interest accrues on your outstanding principal balance. Many borrowers choose to make extra payments to save on interest costs.
We work with credit scores as low as 560. While a higher credit score typically results in a lower APR, we evaluate your full financial picture — including income, employment history, and debt-to-income ratio. Applicants with limited credit history are also welcome to apply.
Your APR is personalised based on your credit profile, income, requested loan amount, and term. Rates range from ${aprMin}% to ${aprMax}% APR. The rate you see during the application process is the rate you'll receive — we don't change it after approval.
Many loans in our network have no origination fee. For loans where a fee applies, it will be clearly disclosed in your loan agreement before you sign. We never add hidden fees after you accept an offer.
Payments are fixed for the entire loan term — the same amount every month, on the same date. Payments are automatically debited from your bank account, so you never miss a due date. You'll receive a full amortization schedule at closing showing exactly how each payment is applied.

Competitive Rates Available

Your Best Rate Is Waiting

Check your rate in 3 minutes with no impact to your credit score. Join 50,000+ borrowers who chose Pastel Lending.

Get My Rate Now — It's Free
No hard credit pull to check rate
Funds as fast as same day
Fixed monthly payments
No prepayment penalties

Important Regulatory Disclosures

Loan Terms & Amounts: Loan amounts range from $${amountMin} to $${amountMax}. Minimum repayment term: 61 days. Maximum repayment term: 60 months (5 years). All loan products offered through this platform require repayment in full in 61 days or longer.

Maximum APR: The maximum Annual Percentage Rate (APR) for personal loans available through this platform is ${aprMax}%. APR is calculated in accordance with the Truth in Lending Act (TILA), 12 CFR Part 1026, and includes the interest rate plus all applicable fees. Minimum APR: ${aprMin}%.

Representative Example: A loan of $5,000 repaid over 36 months at a fixed APR of 14.99% results in 36 monthly payments of $173.17. Total amount repayable: $6,234.12 (including $1,234.12 in interest and fees). Representative APR: 14.99%. Your actual rate will depend on credit score, income, loan amount, loan term, and other factors. Not all applicants will qualify for the lowest rate advertised.

No Guarantee of Approval: Submitting an inquiry or application does not guarantee loan approval or a specific loan offer. All applications are subject to credit review, identity verification, income verification, and lender underwriting criteria. Approval and final loan terms are at the sole discretion of the participating lender.

Credit Inquiry: Checking your rate uses a soft credit pull and will not affect your credit score. Proceeding with a full loan application may result in a hard credit inquiry, which may temporarily affect your credit score. State availability, loan terms, rates, and fees vary by lender and are subject to change without notice. Not available in all states.

Marketplace Disclosure: Pastel Lending is not a direct lender. Pastel Lending operates as a loan referral marketplace connecting consumers with a network of third-party lenders. Pastel Lending does not make credit decisions and is not responsible for lender actions or loan terms. Pastel Lending may receive compensation from lenders for referrals, which does not influence the loan terms offered to you. Please review each lender's terms, rates, and fees carefully before accepting any loan offer.

Risk Warning: Borrowing money involves financial risk. Failure to repay a loan on time may result in additional fees, negative credit reporting, and collections activity. Only borrow what you can comfortably repay. If you are experiencing financial difficulty, consider contacting a nonprofit credit counseling agency such as the NFCC (nfcc.org) for free guidance.
